message:
Add adaptive deadline monitoring with metrics integration

Introduces adaptive warning thresholds that learn from historical task
durations, plus comprehensive deadline-related metrics:

Adaptive threshold configuration (AdaptiveDeadlineConfig):
- adaptive_enabled: Toggle adaptive behavior
- warning_percentile: Historical duration percentile for warnings (default 0.90)
- min_samples: Minimum history before adaptive thresholds apply (default 10)
- max_history: Max entries per task type (default 1000)
- fallback_threshold: Threshold when insufficient history

DurationHistory:
- Ring buffer storing task completion durations per task type
- percentile_nanos(): Calculate arbitrary percentile from history
- Used to compute adaptive warning thresholds

New metrics (MetricsProvider trait):
- deadline_warning(task_type, reason, remaining)
- deadline_violation(task_type, over_by)
- deadline_remaining(task_type, remaining)
- checkpoint_interval(task_type, interval)
- task_stuck_detected(task_type)

OtelMetrics implementation:
- deadline_warnings counter with task_type and reason labels
- deadline_violations counter
- deadline_remaining histogram (seconds)
- checkpoint_interval histogram (seconds)
- task_stuck_detected counter

DeadlineMonitor enhancements:
- record_completion(): Record task completion for adaptive thresholds
- adaptive_warning_threshold(): Compute threshold from history or fallback
- Track violated flag to avoid duplicate violation metrics
- Emit checkpoint intervals when progress is observed
- normalize_task_type() for consistent metric labels
- reason_label() for WarningReason metric labels

Test updates:
- All tests now include adaptive config (disabled by default)
- Fix TaskId::new_for_test argument order in local_queue tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
